case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB VS. SHELIA TAYLOR-HILL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR-HILL, SHELIA AN INDIVIDUAL SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-07-2013
DECLARATION PUIRSUIANT TO CCP 395(B) VENUE OF PERSONAL FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-30-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-30-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NON-SERVICE REPORT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB
